schema_change_detected.description: The top-level 'top_passing_first_5' field is now null in daily_review.json. Top-passing data has moved to domain_review.top_passing (array of full dicts with name/predicted/observed/unit/error_pct/status/source). schema_change_detected.new_schema: array of {name, predicted, observed, unit, error_pct, status, source}
schema_change_detected.impact: Prior reports tracked top_passing_first_5 as a list of name strings. Future runs should read from domain_review.top_passing[*].name. Poller/analyst agents that parse this field may need updating if they reference the old top-level key.
